About Me

Organized, Reliable &
Detail-Oriented

I'm Orline Trapal a trained General Virtual Assistant with a creative edge. I help businesses and entrepreneurs stay organized, communicate professionally, and show up consistently online, so they can focus on what they do best.

My background combines strong administrative skills with a genuine passion for design, giving clients a well-rounded VA who handles both the operational and visual sides of their work beautifully.

What I Do

Services I Offer

From inbox zero to a polished social feed structure, creativity, and reliability in every task.

📧
Email Management

Organizing inboxes, drafting professional responses, flagging priorities, and keeping your communication spotless.

📅
Calendar Management

Scheduling meetings in Google Calendar & Calendly, preventing conflicts, and sending timely reminders.

🎨
Graphic Design

Eye-catching social media graphics, branded visuals, posters, and marketing materials using Canva.

📱
Social Media Management

Content calendars, captions, scheduling posts, and maintaining a consistent, engaging presence across platforms.

🗂️
File Management

Organizing cloud storage (Google Drive, Dropbox), naming conventions, and ensuring easy document retrieval.

⚙️
Administrative Support

Data entry, research, reports, task lists, and day-to-day administrative tasks so you never fall behind.

Brand Identity

Orline Trapal Brand Kit

My personal brand reflects everything I stand for design, inspiration, and elevation. Built around a deep teal palette that speaks to professionalism with warmth.

Primary Logo
Full wordmark with star accent and tagline main brand identifier for all formal use.
Secondary Logo
Monogram mark a compact OR letterform for profile photos, watermarks, and headers.
Submark / Badge
Circular badge logo ideal for stamps, icons, social media highlights, and merchandise.

Background

My Experience

Formally trained and ready to deliver professional virtual assistance from day one.

April – May 2026
Department of Information and Communication Technology (DICT)
General Virtual Assistant Training
  • Managed simulated calendar scheduling using Calendly and Google Calendar, maintaining organized and conflict-free workflows for multiple stakeholders.
  • Practiced professional email management organizing inboxes, drafting business correspondence, and maintaining follow-up tracking systems.
  • Completed structured training in virtual assistance tasks, remote administrative support, and digital tool proficiency.
  • Developed skills in file naming conventions and cloud-based file organization to ensure quick, reliable document retrieval.
  • Created social media content drafts and graphics using Canva, applying branding principles to produce polished, consistent visuals.
  • Practiced data entry, research tasks, and preparing summary reports as part of general administrative support modules.
  • Gained hands-on experience with Google Workspace, and Zoom for remote team coordination.
  • Demonstrated strong written communication skills through professional email drafting and documentation exercises throughout the program.
